session.name: MPI-222 Phase 5 SHIPPED (v0.14.0 pod image built+published, node-drift live-proven local) + Phase 8 RIFE targetPath fix SHIPPED; next = live verifies (Pod + RIFE self-heal) then Phase 7 docs sweep

goal.original: Continue MPI-222: node_lock pins each custom node's commit but nothing records which commit was installed and the install-check is folder-exists only (both engines), so a node bump leaves installs silently stale. Fix = per-node commit marker + drift check + targeted reinstall on boot, NO engine wipe. Plus remote node-install architecture so a node bump never forces a Pod image rebuild. Track every code + doc/rule/memory change in a ledger so nothing drifts at close-out.
goal.summary: Phases 1-5 + a new Phase 8 are DONE and largely self-verified. Local drift ladder is now LIVE-PROVEN (a real restart triggered it: all 10 nodes reinstalled at pinned commits, markers stamped, deps-status drift=0). Phase 5 built + published the v0.14.0 pod image (wrapper 0.2.33, manifest schema v2) — repo edits + CI build + R2 publish all done + verified; only the fresh-Pod GPU verify (user-only) remains. The live restart ALSO surfaced a bug: the drift pre-wipe deleted the RIFE weight (it lives inside the Frame-Interp node folder) — fixed in Phase 8 by making RIFE a tracked engineAsset dep via a new general `targetPath` primitive. Remaining: 2 user-only live verifies (Pod node-drift; RIFE self-heal) + Phase 7 permission-gated docs/rules/memory sweep.

completed: Phase 1-4 (prior session): data model (engineAsset rename, Painter pin, universal-set filter), marker helpers (getPinnedNodeCommit/writeNodeCommitMarker/.mpi_node_commit), LOCAL drift ladder (driftedDeps + repair-deps union + pre-wipe + getInstalledModelNodeDeps deleted + LIVE pip pins), REMOTE app-side (remoteModelsCheck volume->installed:false / baked->ui:warning; MANIFEST_SCHEMA_MAX 1->2). node-drift 12/12.

Phase 5 — mpi-ci Pod image (SEPARATE repo): node_lock resynced byte-identical; Dockerfile bake-split (bake ONLY installRequirements:true; write .mpi_node_commit per baked node); wrapper.py 0.2.32->0.2.33 + MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION 1->2 (_manifest_record_node + _stamp_baked_node_commits + _run_node_install threads commit); start.sh MpiNodes git-pull hook removed; README node-freshness+bake-loop rewritten. Committed 1ab3fa6 + PUSHED to mpi-ci.

Phase 5 build — app pins bumped (remotePodLifecycle.js POD_IMAGE_VERSION v0.12.0->v0.14.0, WRAPPER_VERSION 0.2.24->0.2.33; committed 53b1b1d). CI run 28939295236 SUCCESS both legs (v0.14.0-cu130 Docker Hub + v0.14.0-cpu GHCR), both public+pull-verified. R2 publish gap CAUGHT: wrapper ships via R2 stable not the image; ran publish-runtime.sh stable (wrapper 0.2.33 + start scripts + manifest); cpu boot smoke PASS (/health 0.2.33, manifest schema 2). Skipped v0.13.0 (collides with MPI-191 experiment tag).

LOCAL drift ladder LIVE-PROVEN: user restarted the app -> boot repair fired (no markers existed pre-v0.14.0 -> all 10 nodes read drifted -> full reinstall). Completed clean: all 10 .mpi_node_commit markers stamped, live deps-status = needsDepsInstall:false/missing:0/drifted:0. UI progress bar froze during silent phases (git-build/custom-cmd/boot) but work proceeded — NOT a hang (user confirmed completed).

Phase 8 — RIFE weight = tracked engineAsset dep + new `targetPath` primitive. Surfaced by the live restart: the pre-wipe DELETED rife47.pth (it lives inside custom_nodes/comfyui-frame-interpolation/ckpts/rife/). Fix: shared.js resolveComfyPath targetPath branch; rife47 dep in dependencies.js (engineAsset, targetPath, R2 url, sha256, universal set 16->17); remoteModels.js _isImageResident true for targetPath weights; node-drift +4 cases = 16/16. rife47.pth uploaded to R2 (sha-verified). Local weight RESTORED (app unblocked). Committed deeb935.
pending: USER-ONLY live Pod verify (Phase 5 final): deploy a fresh GPU Pod from v0.14.0 + generate -> 6 baked nodes present, 4 volume nodes install on connect, a MpiNodes commit bump (node_lock only, no rebuild) reinstalls on the volume WITHOUT a rebuild prompt, a baked-node bump -> ui:warning 'image stale'. App must be RESTARTED first (POD_IMAGE_VERSION baked into the Express child at boot). Not provable without a Pod (feedback_runpod_not_local_engine_proof).

USER-ONLY live RIFE self-heal verify (Phase 8): delete engine/.../custom_nodes/comfyui-frame-interpolation/ckpts/rife/rife47.pth + RESTART the app -> deps-status sees rife47 missing -> boot-installs it from R2 into the node ckpts dir, sha-verified. (The running app still has the OLD registry without the RIFE dep; needs a restart to load it. Weight is present now so nothing triggers until deleted.)

Phase 6 — guard tests: already covered by node-drift 16/16 (local drift/marker/pre-wipe/no-wipe + remote drift + targetPath). Likely a no-op confirm; add real fixtures only if a remote assertion needs one.

Phase 7 — PERMISSION-GATED docs/rules/memory + dead-code sweep: drive the changelog.md 'Re-eval required' table to zero (comfy_engine.md, downloads.md, download-manager.md, runpod-remote-engine.md, add-model-playbook.md, universal_workflows.js:6 comment, engine.js:366 comment, build-pod-image skill prose x3, targetPath doc, MEMORY.md hook, + the 2 optional-hardening rows). Grep-clean installOnEngine everywhere. ASK before editing .claude/rules/ or docs/.

MEMORY.md MPI-222 hook to flip to a Done one-liner at end-session (engineAsset rename + bake=installRequirements + GitHub-not-R2-for-nodes + .mpi_node_commit marker + drift ladder + the targetPath primitive + RIFE-as-dep). Also add a hook for the new `targetPath` add-model primitive.
Move research/B-remote-engine.md from session scratchpad into the task research/ dir before end-session (if not already moved).

Optional-hardening follow-ups (cardable, NOT blocking): (1) pre-wipe is over-broad — preserve ckpts/ + weight files across a drifted-node wipe (RIFE now covered by its dep, but a future in-folder-weight node isn't); (2) Dockerfile RIFE bakes from HF while dependencies.js now points at R2 (byte-identical; switch Dockerfile to R2 on the next rebuild for parity — NOT worth a rebuild alone); (3) install-modal UX: indeterminate spinner + phase text during byte-less phases (git-build/custom-cmd/boot) so a drift repair doesn't look hung. User said leave the UX for now.

next_action.description: Read the changelog.md ledger FIRST (it records every Phase 1-8 code change + the 'Re-eval required' table Phase 7 must drive to zero), then the plan. The two remaining live verifies are USER-ONLY and need an app restart + a Pod: (1) RIFE self-heal (delete ckpts/rife/rife47.pth + restart -> boot-installs from R2); (2) fresh v0.14.0 GPU Pod node-drift verify. If the user wants to proceed WITHOUT those, start Phase 7 — the PERMISSION-GATED docs/rules/memory sweep — by working the changelog.md 'Re-eval required' table; ASK before editing any .claude/rules/ or docs/ file. Do NOT start a new pod image build (v0.14.0 is already built + published). Do NOT re-litigate locked architecture.

key_decisions: v0.14.0 NOT v0.13.0 for the pod image: v0.13.0-cu130 already exists on Docker Hub (MPI-191's failed torch-2.12 experiment, reverted but the tag is live + referenced as historical evidence). Rebuilding v0.13.0 would overwrite it. v0.14.0 is on the SAME proven 2.10+cu130 cold stack (torch unchanged — MPI-222 is a node/wrapper/manifest change, not torch).

The wrapper ships via R2 stable, NOT the image (MPI-156/181 bootstrap): the image bakes wrapper.py as a fallback but bootstrap fetches it from R2 at boot. The v0.14.0 rebuild alone was INERT — a first smoke showed image=0.2.33 but /health=0.2.32 (stale R2 override). publish-runtime.sh stable fixed it. LESSON: a node/wrapper change needs BOTH a rebuild (bootstrap.sh + Dockerfile bake-split are image-only) AND an R2 publish.

RIFE fix = Design A (make it a tracked dep) chosen by the user over B (re-host all nodes on R2). Rationale: A keeps node identity = immutable git commit (drift markers intact, node bump = one node_lock line), and adds a NARROW reusable `targetPath` primitive for the rare in-folder-weight case. B would couple node identity to manual R2 uploads and break the commit-drift system. A = less code, fewer break points. ControlNet-and-beyond concern answered: most future weights go in mpi_models/ (already handled); only RIFE-like in-folder weights use targetPath.

`targetPath` primitive: a dep with `targetPath` installs to getComfyPath(ENGINE_ROOT, ...targetPath, filename) under the ComfyUI repo root (bypasses the mpi_models type->subdir mapping), always engine-anchored. filename is a BARE basename. Guard-tested (bare filename + sha256 invariant). This is THE add-model recipe for any node that hard-codes an in-folder weight scan dir.

RIFE node hard-codes its scan dir to <node>/ckpts/rife/ (vfi_utils config.yaml ckpts_path + MODEL_TYPE=folder name); it does NOT read extra_model_paths.yaml, so the weight CANNOT live in mpi_models/. install.py does NOT download RIFE (pip-only); the node lazy-fetches from GitHub on first EXECUTION (load_file_from_github_release). That lazy fetch was the only install path -> a missing weight was invisible to the boot dep-check. Now it's a tracked dep.

The first restart after v0.14.0 reinstalled ALL 10 nodes because no .mpi_node_commit markers existed before this version (installed=none -> all drifted). This is a ONE-TIME cost by design; markers now stamped -> next boot clean (live-confirmed deps-status drift=0). The UI progress bar froze during byte-less phases (git-build/custom-cmd/boot) but was NOT hung.
constraints: mpi-ci is a SEPARATE git repo (c:\AI\Mpi\mpi-ci). Edit with git -C; NEVER git add from Cubric-Vision. Shared-tree commit hygiene: explicit pathspec, never git add -A (feedback_shared_tree_commit_hygiene). Cubric-Vision branch 1.2 is AHEAD of origin with other-session commits — do NOT push without user authorization.

NO pod image build is running or needed — v0.14.0 is built + published + verified. Do NOT start build-pod-image. The build-pod-image SKILL is STALE (logged in ledger): its prose says 'clones each installOnEngine pack' + stale examples (SHIPPED=v0.11.0, COMFYUI_REF v0.19.3) + describes the removed MpiNodes git-pull hook — fix in Phase 7. The bake-split itself is Dockerfile-internal so the skill still BUILDS correctly.

Both live verifies (Pod node-drift; RIFE self-heal) are USER-ONLY and need an APP RESTART: the running app has the OLD dep registry (no rife47 dep, old POD_IMAGE_VERSION). RIFE weight is PRESENT now (restored) so nothing triggers until deleted + restarted.
Phase 7 docs edits are PERMISSION-GATED — ask before touching .claude/rules/ or docs/.

Do NOT re-litigate locked architecture: bake=installRequirements, engineAsset (weights only), .mpi_node_commit marker, drift ladder (volume reinstall / baked warn), GitHub-archive-@-commit for nodes (NOT R2), Design A for RIFE (targetPath dep, not R2-hosted nodes).
remoteModelsCheck fail-safe: absent manifest nodes[] (old wrapper / pre-v0.14.0 Pod) -> NO drift reported -> zero false reinstalls/warns. Harmless on old Pods.
